creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

> > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=186016
> 
> Ups, sorry, there's a make install bug still lingering.

Fixed in http://opsec.eu/backup/p5-Crypt-SMIME.shar

and here:

-------------
#!/bin/sh
# This is a shell archive
echo x security/p5-Crypt-SMIME
mkdir -p security/p5-Crypt-SMIME > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x security/p5-Crypt-SMIME/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' > security/p5-Crypt-SMIME/distinfo << 'SHAR_END'
XSHA256 (Crypt-SMIME-0.10.tar.gz) = 2a981c01369bdc2e7f169a74dfb802528dddceb5e3472290ffaf57de49e2320f
XSIZE (Crypt-SMIME-0.10.tar.gz) = 15485
SHAR_END
echo x security/p5-Crypt-SMIME/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' > security/p5-Crypt-SMIME/pkg-descr << 'SHAR_END'
XCrypt::SMIME - S/MIME message signing, verification, encryption and decryption
X
XWWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Crypt-SMIME/
SHAR_END
echo x security/p5-Crypt-SMIME/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' > security/p5-Crypt-SMIME/Makefile << 'SHAR_END'
X# Created by: Kurt Jaeger
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=	Crypt-SMIME
XPORTVERSION=	0.10
XCATEGORIES=	security perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	CPAN
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	fbsd-ports@opsec.eu
XCOMMENT=	Perl extension to work with SMIME
X
XUSES=		perl5
XUSE_PERL5=	configure
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
SHAR_END
echo x security/p5-Crypt-SMIME/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' > security/p5-Crypt-SMIME/pkg-plist << 'SHAR_END'
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Crypt/SMIME/.packlist
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Crypt/SMIME/SMIME.bs
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Crypt/SMIME/SMIME.so
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Crypt/SMIME/JA.pod
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Crypt/SMIME.pm
X%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SMIME.3.gz
X%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SMIME::JA.3.gz
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Crypt/SMIME
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Crypt
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Crypt/SMIME
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Crypt
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%
X@dirrmtry %%PERL5_MAN3%%
X
SHAR_END
exit
-------------

-- 
pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                         6 years to go !
